attributes.action: Fair & Realistic Indefinite Route Suggestion for Skilled Workers
attributes.additional_details:
1. Allowing ILR after 5 years would eliminate the need to further apply for a visa extension and pay extortionate visa and IHS fees for the next 5 years. 
2. Every Skilled Worker has "No Access to Public Funds"  but still contributes to National Insurance irrespectively, therefore, charging them for 5 additional years of IHS and visa fee would be extremely unfair.
attributes.background: If the plan for implementing ESR is solely to restrict access to benefits claims and prolong naturilization process as its a privilege and not a right, the same can successfully done by providing ILR after 5 years without access to public funds and allowing naturilization eventually after 10 years.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:

'Keep 5-Year ILR and Restrict Access to Benefits for New ILR Holders' https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746363
